interpretation.ace_meaning: Difference in harmful output probability between harmful and benign inputs
interpretation.cde_meaning: Direct effect of input type controlling for hidden state level

interpretation.nde_meaning: Effect of harmful input on output NOT through hidden states
interpretation.nie_meaning: Effect of harmful input on output THROUGH hidden states
interpretation.proportion_meaning: 60.5% of the effect is mediated by hidden states

interpretation.ett_meaning: Intervention reduces harmful output probability by 86.7%
interpretation.benefit_meaning: 86.7% of harmful inputs would benefit from intervention
